project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Fastify backend apps with shared packages
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turborepo. Apps at apps/*, packages at packages/*. Each app has package.json with workspace:* deps.
test_framework: Vitest with vi.fn() mocks, describe/it/expect pattern, tests in backend/__tests__/ directory
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from apps/quantmeet to run all tests. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript strict compliance.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root, then work within apps/quantmeet/
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from registries. No Docker daemon available for testing.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, TypeScript strict (no any), Zod validation on all inputs, every service gets .test.ts

key_patterns.app_entry: apps/*/backend/app.ts uses createApp() from @quant/server-core, registers route plugins with prefix
key_patterns.services: Class-based services with constructor dependency injection (typically PrismaClient). Located in backend/services/
key_patterns.routes: Fastify plugin functions in backend/routes/, use Zod schemas for validation, call service methods
key_patterns.tests: Located in backend/__tests__/, mock dependencies with vi.fn(), test service methods directly
key_patterns.package_json: workspace:* deps to internal packages, fastify ^5.3.3, zod ^3.25.23, vitest ^2
key_patterns.tsconfig: Extends ../../tsconfig.json, includes backend/**/*.ts, references workspace packages

directory_structure: Root: apps/ (9 apps), packages/ (35 shared packages), services/, infra/. Each app: backend/ (app.ts, routes/, services/, __tests__/), package.json, tsconfig.json
